title: glaucium corniculatum var. leiocarpum
intro: Glaucium corniculatum var. leiocarpum, also known as the Lesser Cornflower or Yellow Horned Poppy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for pain and swelling. The health benefits of Glaucium corniculatum var. leiocarpum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
